name: consensus_score
description: Tanh-transformed quality-weighted consensus probability across the 6 sub-models. Recommended threshold: 0.874.

name: merged_ic50_decoys
description: Probability from sub-model trained on IC50 measurements merged across 11 ChEMBL assays (cutoff 10 uM; n=1360 incl. decoys). Recommended threshold: 0.861.

name: merged_activity_decoys
description: Probability from sub-model trained on single-point % activity measurements merged across 12 ChEMBL assays (cutoff 50 %; n=1280 incl. decoys). Recommended threshold: 0.833.

name: general_activity_decoys
description: Probability from sub-model trained on single-point % activity measurements aggregated across 256 ChEMBL assays (cutoff 50 %; n=2500 incl. decoys). Recommended threshold: 0.826.

name: general_ic50_decoys
description: Probability from sub-model trained on IC50 measurements aggregated across 46 ChEMBL assays (cutoff 10 uM; n=2080 incl. decoys). Recommended threshold: 0.856.

name: general_inhibition
description: Probability from sub-model trained on inhibition % measurements aggregated across 33 ChEMBL assays (cutoff 50 %; n=703). Recommended threshold: 0.655.

name: general_ec50
description: Probability from sub-model trained on EC50 measurements aggregated across 38 ChEMBL assays (cutoff 10 uM; n=365). Recommended threshold: 0.487.
